# Agent PR Template (<= 3000 chars)

Problem (100-150 chars)

Solution (100-150 chars)

Architecture (ASCII diagram)
```
[Component A] -> [Component B] -> [Component C]
```

Files
- path/to/file.ext: change summary
- path/to/file2.ext: change summary

Implementation (60-70% of budget)
1. Requirement one with precise file path + function names.
2. Requirement two with line references (line ~120).
3. Requirement three.

Flow Diagram (before/after)
```
[Start] -> [Action] -> <Condition?>
```

Acceptance
- [ ] Specific, testable outcome
- [ ] Validation step

Constraints
- 3000 char hard limit.
- Add "Files to AVOID" when scope is narrow.
- Skip build if Berkeley DB deps are missing.

Integration Checklist
- [ ] Integration points listed
- [ ] Diagram labels match component names
- [ ] File list complete
